education.degree: Master of Science in ICT for Internet and Multimedia
education.description: Focus on Machine Learning, IoT, and E-Health[cite: 6, 10]. Thesis: Ultrasonic platform with ML for privacy-preserving sound uroflowmetry[cite: 9].
Thesis on skin neural prostheses and mobility[cite: 14, 16, 17].

experience.description: Improved uterus imaging segmentation accuracy by 25% and reduced misdiagnosis rates by 18% using ML[cite: 21, 25].

experience.role: Research Assistant - Machine Learning for Healthcare
experience.description: Achieved 85% accuracy with SVM algorithms for physiological flow rate extraction from sound[cite: 31, 35].

portfolio.name: Digital Dental Counter (International Patent)
portfolio.description: Patent A61C3/14; A61B1/24. Reduced medical extraction errors from 20% to 5%[cite: 75, 76].

portfolio.name: Targeted Credential Generation (Llama-3)
portfolio.description: Achieved 100% PII correlation rate using Llama-3-8B for targeted password generation.

skills.list: PyTorch, Keras, TensorFlow, Scikit-learn (SVM), LLM Fine-tuning (Llama-3).
